description:
As a support user, I want to initiate a refund for a settled payment so that customers can receive money back when required.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Refund should be allowed only for settled payments.
- Refund amount cannot exceed the captured amount.
- Refund amount must be greater than zero.
- Reason is mandatory for every refund request.
- Duplicate refund request with same idempotency key should not create multiple refunds.
